mods.name: High-Flow Intake
mods.description: Replace the stock airbox with a performance intake system for improved turbo spool and induction sound on the B48 or N55 engine.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox assembly. Attach new intake tube with included silicone coupler. Ensure MAF sensor housing aligns correctly. 20 minute job.

mods.name: Axle-Back Exhaust
mods.description: Upgrade the rear muffler section for a sportier exhaust note while keeping the factory mid-pipe and catalytic converter for emissions compliance.
mods.installNotes: Unbolt rear muffler from mid-pipe flange. Slide new exhaust onto factory hangers. No cutting or welding. 45 minutes on jack stands.

mods.name: Performance Lowering Springs
mods.description: Lower the F30 by 20–30mm for a sportier stance and reduced body roll. Compatible with adaptive dampers when properly coded.
mods.installNotes: Spring compressor required. If equipped with adaptive suspension, use BimmerCode to adjust ride height sensor calibration. Alignment mandatory after install.

mods.name: MHD Flash Tune (N55/B58)
mods.description: Flash the ECU via the OBD-II port using the MHD app for significant power gains. Stage 1 adds 40–60hp on the N55 with no other hardware required.
mods.partNumbers: MHD Flasher license (Android device required), Vgate iCar Pro BLE adapter
mods.installNotes: Download MHD app, connect via Bluetooth OBD adapter. Read stock DME first, then flash Stage 1 map. Requires 93 octane. Stage 2 requires downpipe and intercooler.

mods.name: Upgraded Front-Mount Intercooler
mods.description: A larger intercooler dramatically reduces charge air temperatures under sustained boost, preventing power loss from heat soak on hot days or track sessions.
mods.installNotes: Remove front bumper cover and crash bar. Unbolt stock intercooler, transfer charge pipe connections to new unit. May require minor bracket modification. 2–3 hours.

mods.name: Catless Downpipe
mods.description: A catless or high-flow catted downpipe reduces exhaust backpressure at the turbo outlet for faster spool and 20–30hp gains when paired with a tune.
mods.partNumbers: VRSF N55 Downpipe, CTS Turbo CTS-EXH-DP-0024
mods.installNotes: Access from below on a lift. Pre-soak turbo-to-downpipe bolts with penetrant. O2 sensor extender or software coding needed to suppress CEL. Requires tune for full benefit.

mods.name: Upgraded Turbo (N55)
mods.description: Swap the stock turbo for a larger hybrid unit capable of supporting 400–500hp. The factory N55 turbo runs out of breath around 350hp.
mods.partNumbers: Vargas Turbo VTT GC 6258, Pure Turbos PURE Stage 2
mods.installNotes: Requires removal of exhaust manifold and turbo assembly. Upgraded fuel injectors (index 12+), HPFP, and custom MHD Stage 2+ tune required. Upgraded clutch strongly recommended. 15+ hour job.

mods.name: Adjustable Coilovers
mods.description: Full coilover system with adjustable ride height and damping for the ultimate in handling setup, from daily comfort to full track attack.
mods.partNumbers: KW V3 352200AE, BC Racing BR Series F30
mods.installNotes: Replace full strut assemblies at all four corners. Set initial ride height 20mm below stock. Adjust damping to mid-range for street. Full alignment and corner balance recommended.
